title: HuggingGPT: Solving AI Tasks with ChatGPT and its Friends in Hugging Face

defines.name: HuggingGPT
defines.definition: An LLM-powered agent that uses ChatGPT as a controller to plan tasks, select expert models from Hugging Face, execute them, and synthesize the results for complex AI requests.

problem: Current LLMs cannot autonomously solve complicated multimodal AI tasks and need a way to coordinate external expert models.
